hook: One of the cleanest ways to handle ambiguity is to become clearer yourself once.
body: A direct but light question can often surface whether the connection has real forward motion or not.

hook: Men sometimes stay permanently indirect because they think clarity will scare away what is uncertain.
body: If clarity scares it away, the ambiguity may have been doing more work than the connection itself.

body: A simple check-in about meeting, continuing, or how the vibe feels can save weeks of private interpretation.
